creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #8)
argh! they released 1.1.5 today - they're seriously annoying.  If they keep this up, they'll catch up with chrome for version numbers...

Please continue to process 1.1.4 into ports and i'll look at updating it to whatever new version they're up to in a week or two.
